A close-up shot of a vinyl record label with a circular design featuring concentric orange and brown rings on a beige background. The center hole is visible, and the label is mounted on a black vinyl disc. The background shows a blurred, dark surface with faint reflections, suggesting a shallow depth of field. The lighting is soft and even, highlighting the texture of the label and the glossy surface of the vinyl. The overall composition is centered and tightly framed around the label, emphasizing its graphic elements and circular symmetry.
